tweets.text: Statement by @SecPompeo: "On behalf of the Department of State, I would like to wish a Merry Christmas to all those celebrating today, together with Orthodox Christians celebrating in early January." #Christmas #ChristmasDay2018 https://t.co/xRxpB0xFon

This week, @StateDeptPM released the 17th edition of 'To Walk the Earth in Safety' report, the United States and Netherlands began accepting applications for @theGESsummit, and @USUN addressed the situation in the Middle East. Read more: https://t.co/0EWr3mAFUD https://t.co/xZKjtaRpCA
United States, United Kingdom, and Norway issue joint statement on harassment of East African monitoring group near Juba. Read more: https://t.co/g9XHlnSEix https://t.co/sD8U9M0jAJ

.@EnergyAtState A/S Frank Fannon underscores the importance of the Sempra #LNG deal with #Poland as a meaningful way to advance U.S. and transatlantic energy security and how U.S. industry is reshaping global energy markets. https://t.co/eiAGqnz2L5

.@SecPompeo and @SecNielsen: We strongly urge #China to abide by its commitment to act responsibly in cyberspace and reiterate that the U.S. will take appropriate measures to defend our interests. https://t.co/YVRnlFSTLC
This afternoon, @SecPompeo welcomed Foreign Secretary @teddyboylocsin of the #Philippines to the State Department. @dfaphl @USEmbassyPH @philippinesusa https://t.co/02LSyDFdUu
This afternoon, @SecPompeo welcomed #Oman’s Foreign Minister Yusuf bin Alawi bin Abdullah to the State Department. @USEmbMuscat @OmanEmbassyUSA https://t.co/vvjeyUBSS7

.@SecPompeo: The United States welcomes #Bulgaria’s defense modernization plans & looks forward to the country’s imminent selection of a new multirole fighter aircraft. The U.S. looks forward to completing final negotiations with the Bulgarian government. https://t.co/TQZl4rxk6m
This morning, @SecPompeo welcomed #Norway's Foreign Minister Ine Marie Eriksen Soreide to the State Department. @NorwayMFA @usembassyoslo @NorwayUS https://t.co/rNDntJ9lJK

As a longtime veteran of law enforcement and security, @StateDeptDSS  Special Agent Wendy Bashnan is the first woman to serve as a Director of @NATO Office of Security. Read more about her story here. https://t.co/5E07R32Ec0

The release of 17th edition of To Walk the Earth in Safety, @StateDeptPM’s annual report on accomplishments of U.S. Conventional Weapons Destruction Program, highlights our commitment to making post-conflict communities safer & setting stage for recovery. https://t.co/txyPNBysBK

For 20+ years, U.S. has led international donor community in promoting peace & security worldwide by partnering w/nations to reduce availability of excess small arms & light weapons, & address humanitarian hazards from landmines in post-conflict countries. https://t.co/xEkyLjVwCR

.@StateDeputySpox: We join others in demanding investigation into death of arbitrarily detained activist Vahid Sayaddi-Nassiri, release of Nassrin Satoudeh & other arbitrarily detained individuals, incl. Farhad Meissami, & granting of people of #Iran their fundamental freedoms.

.@StateDeputySpox: We welcome recent statements issued by #France and #EU Parliament, and the resolution presented by #Canada at the @UN, that was adopted by a clear majority yesterday, drawing the world’s attention once again to the #Iran regime’s heinous #humanrights record. https://t.co/MnUKP1FMG8

.@StateDeputySpox highlights the release of the 17th edition of To Walk the Earth in Safety, @StateDeptPM’s annual report summarizing the accomplishments of the U.S. Conventional Weapons Destruction Program. https://t.co/1cqLmG82fI
Live now! @StateDeputySpox Robert Palladino addresses reporters at the Department Press Briefing on December 18, 2018. https://t.co/JGBnLSUPXD
This afternoon, @SecPompeo welcomed #Nepal’s Foreign Minister Pradeep Gyawali to the State Department. @MofaNepal @usembassynepal @State_SCA https://t.co/nQ8tQ4pEIK
Check out @StateDept's Dr. Kiron Skinner's interview with @hughhewitt on the centrality of the nation-state in the ongoing international order. https://t.co/X83GmeDeRf

Amb. Jeffrey at @AtlanticCouncil: The war in #Syria has raged for 7+ years. Over 500,000 dead, the largest humanitarian crisis since WWII, half of Syria’s population displaced...Murders in Assad’s prisons & tens of thousands have disappeared. #UNSC Res. 2254 is the road forward. https://t.co/DrjdSbjz7L
Amb. Jeffery at @AtlanticCouncil: All agree there is no military solution to the conflict in #Syria. #UNSC Resolution 2254 is the path forward. https://t.co/S8xGmSh5PF
Live now! Ambassador James Jeffrey delivers the keynote address at the @AtlanticCouncil's “The Future of U.S. Policy in Syria” program. Watch live here. https://t.co/ApaCRe5ZtS
.@SecPompeo greeted #NewZealand Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs @winstonpeters today at the State Department. https://t.co/fl8xP4lbXU
During his visit to Sofia, #Bulgaria, Deputy Secretary John Sullivan met with Bulgarian President Rumen Radev and Prime Minister @BoykoBorissov. https://t.co/Q3nxqYoLW8

This week, @SecPompeo hosted U.S.-#Canada 2+2 Ministerial and U.S.-#Greece Strategic Dialogue, addressed the #UNSC meeting on #Iran, and signed @MCCGov Compact with #Senegal; and DepSec Sullivan hosted WHA Counterterrorism Ministerial & traveled to Europe. https://t.co/fZXAKWFSpP https://t.co/P7cfF8Lclh

.@SecPompeo and @DeptofDefense Secretary Mattis hosted Canadian Foreign Minister @cafreeland and Defense Minister @HarjitSajjan for the U.S.-#Canada 2+2 Ministerial. The four reviewed joint security initiatives in the U.S., Canada and throughout the world. https://t.co/ivoob7rPsd https://t.co/X1KLbWu5OK

Deputy Secretary Sullivan is on travel to Europe. In Vienna, he thanked his counterparts for #Austria’s contributions to security cooperation, engaged with civil society, including at a Christmas market, and met with @usembvienna colleagues. https://t.co/yXZWg6qRZ7 https://t.co/Qq9MBRZWks
This afternoon, @SecPompeo welcomed #Slovenia's Foreign Minister @MiroCerar to the State Department. @MZZRS @USEmbassySLO @SLOinUSA https://t.co/2Bfx0E08OQ

Today, @DeptofDefense Secretary James Mattis delivered remarks at the U.S.-#Canada 2+2 Ministerial with @SecPompeo and their Canadian counterparts, @HarjitSajjan and @cafreeland. @CanadaFP @USEmbassyOttawa @CanEmbUSA @NationalDefence https://t.co/LmfZHKEWcW

Today, @SecPompeo delivered remarks at the U.S.-#Canada 2+2 Ministerial with @DeptofDefense Secretary Mattis and their Canadian counterparts,  @cafreeland and @HarjitSajjan. @CanadaFP @USEmbassyOttawa @CanEmbUSA @NationalDefence https://t.co/un6V56mfTF

Live now! @SecPompeo and @DeptofDefense Secretary Mattis join Canadian Foreign Affairs Minister @cafreeland and Defense Minister @HarjitSajjan for the U.S.–#Canada 2+2 Ministerial press conference. @CanadaFP @USEmbassyOttawa @CanEmbUSA @NationalDefence https://t.co/px6YP39Wi2

Today, @SecPompeo and @DeptofDefense Secretary Mattis and their Canadian counterparts, @cafreeland and @HarjitSajjan, will address reporters as part of the U.S.-#Canada 2+2 Ministerial at approximately 1:10 p.m. ET. Watch live here on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/QIhMVDmH2I

U.S. imposed sanctions on 3 individuals for roles in the conflict in #SouthSudan. U.S. is sending message that behavior of these persons is unacceptable & contrary to ongoing U.S. efforts to assist people of South Sudan & establish lasting peaceful resolution to current conflict. https://t.co/ldiPbtEjWz

This morning, @SecPompeo and @DeptofDefense Secretary Mattis welcomed Canadian Foreign Affairs Minister @cafreeland and Defense Minister @HarjitSajjan for the U.S.–#Canada 2+2 Ministerial. @CanadaFP @USEmbassyOttawa @CanEmbUSA @NationalDefence https://t.co/EZBW1HNrgq

Today, @SecPompeo and @DeptofDefense Secretary Mattis will join Canadian Foreign Affairs Minister @cafreeland and Defense Minister @HarjitSajjan for the U.S.–#Canada 2+2 Ministerial. https://t.co/HdsKgGZFga https://t.co/NHFLKYffH1

Today, @SecPompeo and Greek Acting Foreign Minister @gkatr launched the inaugural U.S.-#Greece Strategic Dialogue. The Strategic Dialogue builds on a year of intensive engagement and highlights the strength of the bilateral relationship. https://t.co/dUz1zlCIEq https://t.co/HIThX9Xafp

Today, @AmbJohnBolton delivered remarks laying out the Trump Administration's new #AfricaStrategy at the @Heritage Foundation that will further U.S. priorities in the region. Read more. https://t.co/ZW9I6Mr5xC

This afternoon, @SecPompeo delivered remarks with Greek Acting Minister of Foreign Affairs @gkatr as part of the U.S.-#Greece Strategic Dialogue at the State Department. @GreeceMFA @USEmbassyAthens @GreeceInUSA https://t.co/HjrDFYKAJ8

Live now! @SecPompeo and Greek Acting Minister of Foreign Affairs @gkatr address reporters as part of the U.S.-#Greece Strategic Dialogue at the State Department. @GreeceMFA @USEmbassyAthens @GreeceInUSA https://t.co/fWsoWnqwbe

Starting soon! @SecPompeo and Greek Acting Minister of Foreign Affairs @gkatr will address reporters following the U.S.-#Greece Strategic Dialogue at the State Department. Watch live here on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. @GreeceMFA @USEmbassyAthens @GreeceInUSA

.@SecPompeo and @DeptofDefense Secretary Mattis will join Canadian Foreign Affairs Minister @cafreeland and Defense Minister @HarjitSajjan for the U.S.–#Canada 2+2 Ministerial on December 14. https://t.co/HdsKgGZFga https://t.co/WmYcx3RBtc
Yesterday, @SecPompeo alerted the world about the Iranian regime’s growing missile threat. Here’s some of the evidence unveiled by Special Representative for #Iran Brian Hook. https://t.co/0vnZ4uhjpk
Starting soon! @AmbJohnBolton delivers remarks on the Trump Administration's New #Africa Strategy at the @Heritage Foundation. Watch live here. https://t.co/ontSYkMKYe
Read @StateDept Director of Policy Planning Kiron Skinner's @WSJ opinion piece on the Trump Administration reasserting the nation-state’s role in a free and open order. https://t.co/OtiEET82FN

.@SecPompeo: #Iran has been on a testing spree and a proliferation spree and this must come to an end. We want to work with all members of the Security Council to reimpose tougher restrictions on the Iranian ballistic missiles. https://t.co/xF6IIWDLZ7
Starting soon, @SecPompeo deliver remarks to the press at the @UN Watch live here on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/9TPDjre68C

.@SecPompeo: The United States will keep standing side by side with the people of #Iran, who have been the worst victims of the regime for nearly forty years. They have the unwavering support of the United States. https://t.co/gYYmxWlofi

.@SecPompeo: Our goodwill gestures have been futile correctives to the Iranian regime’s reckless missile activity – and all other destructive behaviors. No nation can dispute that #Iran is in open defiance of UNSCR 2231. https://t.co/hxhp1wjde1

.@SecPompeo: Our goodwill gestures have been futile correctives to the Iranian regime’s reckless missile activity – and all other destructive behaviors. No nation can dispute that #Iran is in open defiance of UNSCR 2231. https://t.co/OnlQkMlhty
Live now! @SecPompeo participates in a @UN Security Council meeting on #Iran. https://t.co/xahy1KDQjm
Today, @SecPompeo will participate in a @UN Security Council meeting on #Iran at 10:00 a.m. ET. Watch live here on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lZRv7. https://t.co/z2T4wvoT0l
Watch @SecPompeo’s interview on @foxandfriends this morning. https://t.co/oVPEcmbuiO

On December 11, Deputy Secretary of State John Sullivan delivered remarks at the Western Hemisphere Counterterrorism Ministerial, emphasizing that working together is the only way to counter the challenges posed by transnational terrorism. Learn more: https://t.co/qIy6w1oYKD

On December 12, @SecPompeo will travel to New York to participate in a #UNSC meeting on #Iran. During the meeting, he will underscore the Administration’s resolve to address the Iranian regime’s threats through their continued development and proliferation of ballistic missiles. https://t.co/qqJBZsmkEb
Deputy Secretary of State John J. Sullivan will travel to Bratislava, Vienna, Sofia, Sarajevo, Skopje, and Warsaw from December 12-20. https://t.co/PS07JMiAv6

Deputy @statedeptspox Palladino: Today, the U.S. formally returned the Bells of Balangiga to the #Philippines. The return of the Balangiga Bells demonstrates the enduring strength of the U.S.-Philippines alliance & the deep bonds of friendship between the peoples of our nations. https://t.co/EqicxPslqR

Deputy @statedeptspox Palladino provides a readout of the Western Hemisphere Counterterrorism Ministerial that Deputy Secretary John Sullivan is hosting today at the State Department. https://t.co/4FUKKegDw1
Special Presidential Envoy for the Global @Coalition to Defeat ISIS @Brett_McGurk provides an update on the campaign to defeat ISIS. https://t.co/pqe2nWO7zx

Live now! Special Presidential Envoy for the Global Coalition to Defeat ISIS @Brett_McGurk and Deputy @statedeptspox Robert Palladino address reporters at the Department Press Briefing. https://t.co/J0APfllXVa

.@SecPompeo: Safeguarding #ReligiousFreedom is vital to ensuring peace, stability & prosperity. These designations are aimed at improving the lives of individuals and the broader success of their societies. Read @SecPompeo's Religious Freedom Designations. https://t.co/CZjTHrp4H2

.@SecPompeo called Georgian President-elect @zourabichvili_s to congratulate her on her election victory. They discussed U.S.-Georgian cooperation on common global security priorities, U.S. unwavering support for #Georgia’s sovereignty, independence, and territorial integrity. https://t.co/vXSB944rOW
This morning, Deputy Secretary John Sullivan delivered opening remarks at The Western Hemisphere Counterterrorism Ministerial. https://t.co/7e7KId4Zha
Happening now! Deputy Secretary of State John Sullivan delivers opening remarks at the ministerial on counterterrorism cooperation in the Western Hemisphere. https://t.co/tquxCZzsAq

The U.S. congratulates the people of #Armenia on the conduct of their parliamentary elections. We look forward to working w/ the new Armenian Parliament and Government to deepen our bilateral partnership and cooperation to strengthen the rule of law and democratic institutions. https://t.co/KpHbJQd2UC

Today, @SecPompeo met with Senegalese Prime Minister Mohammed Dionne. The Secretary and Prime Minister agreed on the importance of maintaining Senegal’s democratic traditions in the upcoming February 2019 election & discussed ways to cooperate on matters of regional security. https://t.co/CmWbZeIfZ0
.@SecPompeo sent a letter to FM Rodriguez of #Cuba asking for a substantive explanation of the detention of the political prisoners https://t.co/hn20YsaDY2

.@SecPompeo: On this #HumanRightsDay, the U.S. underscores its commitment to promoting human freedom at home and around the world. Read more how the @StateDept is celebrating Human Rights Day & 70 years of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights. https://t.co/LxrfVoE6k8

Today, @SecPompeo and #Senegal's Prime Minister Dionne signed the @MCCgov Power Compact. The compact is designed to increase reliability and access to electricity, support economic growth and reduce poverty in one of #Africa’s fastest growing economies. https://t.co/XsyEnWUkyn

Human rights abuses in #NorthKorea remain among the worst in the world. Today, in commemoration of #HumanRightsDay and to promote accountability for North Korean officials, we are releasing our Report on #HumanRights Abuses and Censorship in North Korea. https://t.co/6WucMXmR2o

Deputy Secretary Sullivan will host and deliver opening remarks at the ministerial on counterterrorism cooperation in the Western Hemisphere at 9:00 a.m. ET on December 11. Watch live on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. More info: https://t.co/I6Iz9Rm31v
We applaud the #EU’s efforts to counter disinformation. The publication of its Action Plan is an important step to counter #Russia’s diversionary tactics to mislead. https://t.co/DYDCoN5GWN

This morning, @SecPompeo welcomed #Senegal’s Prime Minister Mahammed Boun Abdallah Dionne and participated in the @MCCGov Signing Ceremony at the State Department. @usembassydakar https://t.co/lhTaqwH6G5

Unfortunately, this #AntiCorruptionDay is a reminder for Iranians that their government is full of corrupt hypocrites. Meet Grand Ayatollah Makaram Shirazi—The Sultan of Sugar. He made millions flooding the market with expensive imported sugar, putting Iranian people out of work. https://t.co/30wGEcNLbv

This #AntiCorruptionDay Iranians have much to despair about. Their government is full of corrupt hypocrites. Meet Sadegh Mahsouli—The Billionaire General. Somehow he had a knack for winning lucrative construction and oil contracts from IRGC businesses. He is now worth billions. https://t.co/m9OL0srEei

Today is #AntiCorruptionDay. Sadly, for the Iranian people, their government is full of corrupt hypocrites. Take Ayatollah Khamenei, who has a tax-free hedge fund worth billions. This so-called holy man devours property from religious minorities, then funnels the cash to IRGC. https://t.co/rnAwNaLhfW

U.S. condemns arbitrary detention of Dr. Farhad Meisami. We are deeply concerned about his rapidly deteriorating health and call on Iranian regime to immediately release him. The people of #Iran deserve a govt that respects their rights, not one that subjects them to slow death.

We call on #Russia to immediately release 77-year-old #humanrights defender Lev #Ponomarev, who was arrested and sentenced to 16 days in jail for sharing a social media post calling for peaceful protest. https://t.co/nnoTOPO0JU

On Nov. 24, the Assad regime & #Russia falsely accused the opposition & extremist groups of conducting a chlorine attack in northwestern Aleppo. U.S. strongly refutes this narrative & has credible info. pro-regime forces likely used teargas against civilians in Aleppo on Nov. 24. https://t.co/Avz6vKYUz0

.@SecPompeo: As we look ahead to #InternationalAnticorruptionDay on December 9, we pledge to continue working with our partners to prevent & combat corruption worldwide. We call on all countries to implement their international anticorruption commitments. https://t.co/Zwz2Mew0nZ

"Serving President Bush was an honor and the highlight of my @USMC career and I am deeply saddened by his passing." Read more from @StateDeptDSS Physical Security Specialist Richard Truman as he remembers President George H.W. Bush: https://t.co/cx47YeCv9n.
This morning, @SecPompeo welcomed Republic of #Korea Foreign Minister Kang Kyung-wha to the State Department. @MOFAkr_eng @USEmbassySeoul @RokEmbDC https://t.co/9TylNH5hga
.@SecPompeo participates in the @NATO Foreign Ministerial family photo in Brussels. #ForMin https://t.co/TuY8RA8ugN

Special Rep. Hook: Every year, #Iran’s regime steals $700 million from its people & sends it to Hizballah to fund its terrorist activities—like the newly-discovered tunnels—against Israel. We’re determined to exert maximum pressure to reverse all of the Iranian regime’s threats.
Today, @SecPompeo addressed reporters at the @NATO Foreign Ministerial in Brussels. #ForMin https://t.co/paZmFoyPZJ
Today, @SecPompeo met with #NATO Secretary General @jensstoltenberg in Brussels. https://t.co/6US8VVDVjv
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Belgium’s Prime Minister @CharlesMichel in Brussels. @usembbrussels https://t.co/cQwLnZcPN0
Watch live now: @SecPompeo delivers remarks at the German Marshall Fund (@gmfus) in #Brussels, Belgium. https://t.co/S2OPqBHsib
.@SecPompeo’s Special Representative for #Syria Engagement Ambassador James F. Jeffrey briefs the media on the results of the Syria Small Group meetings. https://t.co/gSJy96pt9A
Live now! @SecPompeo’s Special Representative for #Syria Engagement Ambassador James F. Jeffrey and Syria Envoy and Deputy Assistant Secretary Joel Rayburn brief the media. https://t.co/1SwGnuCH7J

Today, @SecPompeo's Special Representative for #Syria Engagement Ambassador James F. Jeffrey and Syria Envoy and Deputy Assistant Secretary Joel Rayburn will brief the media at 3:00 p.m. ET. Watch live here on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.

Special Rep. Hook: Few days ago, we unveiled new evidence of #Iran’s missile proliferation. Three days later they test-launched a ballistic missile. We are accumulating risk of regional conflict if we don't deter Iran’s missile testing and proliferation. https://t.co/p2v1JlJKgA https://t.co/k2ATTB2clH

.@SecPompeo travels to Brussels on December 3-5 to participate in the semi-annual meeting of @NATO #ForMin to review progress made in implementing the agenda agreed by #NATO Heads of State and Government at the Brussels Summit in July. https://t.co/D0qIA3AWAc

Just a couple of days ago, the U.S. unveiled evidence of the Iranian regime’s ongoing missile development and proliferation. Today, the regime test-fired another ballistic missile capable of reaching parts of Europe and anywhere in the Mideast. The risk of escalation is growing.

.@SecPompeo: Iranian regime just test-fired a medium range ballistic missile capable of striking Europe & the Middle East. This violates #UNSC Res. 2231. #Iran’s missile testing & proliferation is growing. We are accumulating risk of escalation if we fail to restore deterrence. https://t.co/ZEKPpHI6Ij
President @realDonaldTrump and @SecPompeo join a grieving nation in mourning the loss of former President George H.W. Bush. Read more: https://t.co/AybdMBAnOT

We extend our heartfelt condolences to the entire Bush family. President George H. W. Bush was one of America’s most consequential and dedicated public servants. His love for our country and his family will endure as a towering legacy. https://t.co/cBVJgUcpfT

This week, @SecPompeo praised @PEPFAR's life-saving work before #WorldAIDSDay and accompanied President @realDonaldTrump to the #G20Summit2018; Special Representative for #Iran Brian Hook unveiled evidence of the Iranian regime's missile proliferation. https://t.co/480OJSBDcd https://t.co/fU03DbQeL7
